title: Stackr Quest — World Index
description: Master list of all worlds, their themes, unlock requirements, and metadata.

worlds.name: Foundation
worlds.description: Learn the basics. Master stacking, clearing lines, and scoring.

worlds.name: Retro Land
worlds.description: Think before you drop. Every piece counts in this retro challenge.

worlds.name: Coral Depths
worlds.description: Dive deep. Shatter the ice that blocks your path.

worlds.name: Neon District
worlds.description: Chain combos, build momentum, dominate the neon grid.

worlds.name: Molten Core
worlds.description: Harness the explosions. Use bomb blocks to your advantage.

worlds.name: Dreamscape
worlds.description: Not everything is as it seems. Reveal the hidden blocks.

worlds.name: Thunderspire
worlds.description: Build around the immovable. Navigate the stone blocks.

worlds.name: Frozen Peaks
worlds.description: Adapt to the rhythm. Gravity shifts when you least expect it.

worlds.name: Starfield
worlds.description: Up is down. Master the gravity flip to survive the void.

worlds.name: The Nexus
worlds.description: Everything you've learned. Every mechanic. The ultimate test.
